title: Create: ComputerCraft Recipes
description: Changes recipes from CC: Tweaked to use Create items, and to match the textures from "Create: ComputerCraft"
body:
Modifies the CC: Tweaked recipies to be later game, use Create items and processes, and to match the textures from the excellent texure pack [Create: ComputerCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-computercraft).

I've been using this datapack in my own survival world for a long time, but I thought others might want it too. Feel free to modify, put in packs, whatever.

![The new computer recipe: a sequenced gearshift is crafted into a computer using deployers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32884c76e68c9b04f158b5d50cba68b76661c0dc.png)

![The new turtle recipe: requires a computer, toolbox, robotic arm, and a turtle shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7caa774e2d61efc5de6df1ab3e14a4d00494570.png)

## Crafting Table Recipes

| Output | Recipe Type | Ingredients |
|---|---|---|
| Wired Cable ×6 | Shapeless Crafting | Copper Ingot + Brass Sheet + Dried Kelp |
| Disk Drive | Shaped Crafting | Electron Tube, 2× Precision Mechanism, Oxidized Copper, Jukebox |
| Printer | Shaped Crafting | Electron Tube, 2× Precision Mechanism, Oxidized Copper, Schematic Table |
| Redstone Relay | Shaped Crafting | 4× Redstone Dust, Andesite Casing, 2× Brass Sheet |
| Speaker | Shapeless Crafting | Note Block + Andesite Casing + Redstone Dust + Precision Mechanism |
| Wired Modem | Shaped Crafting | 4× Copper Nugget + Andesite Casing |
| Normal Turtle | Shapeless Crafting | Normal Computer + Mechanical Arm + Brown Toolbox + Turtle Helmet |
| Advanced Turtle | Shapeless Crafting | Advanced Computer + Mechanical Arm + Brown Toolbox + Turtle Helmet |

## Create: Pressing (Mechanical Press)

| Output | Recipe Type | Ingredient |
|---|---|---|
| Floppy Disk | Pressing | Polished Rose Quartz |
| Normal Pocket Computer | Pressing | Normal Computer |
| Advanced Pocket Computer | Pressing | Advanced Computer |

## Create: Sequenced Assembly

| Output | Base Item | Deployed Items (per loop) | Loops |
|---|---|---|---|
| Normal Computer | Sequenced Gearshift | Iron Sheet, Electron Tube, Diamond | 5 |
| Advanced Computer | Normal Computer | Golden Sheet, Electron Tube, Netherite Scrap | 5 |
| Command Computer (unobtainable) | Command Block | Refined Radiance, Electron Tube, Shadow Steel | 777 |
| Normal Monitor | Display Board | Iron Sheet, Electron Tube, Glass | 3 |
| Advanced Monitor | Normal Monitor | Golden Sheet, Electron Tube, Tinted Glass | 3 |
| Advanced Pocket Computer (upgrade) | Normal Pocket Computer | Golden Sheet, Electron Tube, Netherite Scrap | 5 |
| Advanced Turtle (upgrade) | Normal Turtle | Golden Sheet, Electron Tube, Netherite Scrap | 5 |
| Normal Wireless Modem | Redstone Link | Iron Sheet, Ender Pearl, Wired Modem | 3 |
| Advanced Wireless Modem | Redstone Link | Golden Sheet, Ender Eye, Netherite Scrap | 3 |
